title: 日本ダービーの後に・525mの青春

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is over. Mejiro Ryan and Ines Fujin are
met with unsparing applause from the audience
who just witnessed their fierce battle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having regained her confidence from the heated
race, Mejiro Ryan is more motivated than ever for
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen, also having watched the race,
ponders her upcoming matchup against the
improved capability of Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're midway through the Classics, and more
tough races lie ahead for Ryan in the fall.
